author: Aaij, Roel and others
title: Angular moments of the decay $\Lambda_b^0 \rightarrow \Lambda \mu^{+} \mu^{-}$ at low hadronic recoil
abstract: an analysis of the angular distribution of the decay $\Lambda^0_b \to \Lambda \mu^+ \mu^-$, using data collected between 2011 and 2016 and corresponding to an integrated luminosity of approximately 5 fb$^{−1}$
